# First Class Auto Glass

> AGSC-certified auto glass repair, windshield replacement, and ADAS recalibration serving Mooresville and all of Iredell County, North Carolina. Mobile and in-shop service, all major insurance accepted, limited lifetime warranty. Owner: Keith Brown.

## Business Facts (authoritative NAP)
- Name: First Class Auto Glass
- Owner: Keith Brown
- Phone: (980) 242-8339
- Email: contact@firstclassautoglassnc.com
- Address: 1892 Charlotte Hwy, Unit 1, Mooresville, NC 28115
- Service area: Iredell County, NC — Mooresville (HQ), Statesville, Lexington
- Hours: Monday–Friday 9:00 AM–5:00 PM; Saturday 9:00 AM–11:30 AM; Sunday closed
- In business: 15+ years
- Facebook: https://facebook.com/firstclassautoglassnc
- Twitter/X: https://twitter.com/fcautoglass

## Services
- Windshield Repair — flat rate $80 for one or a few chips; cheaper than replacement; mobile service; preserves structural integrity.
- Windshield Replacement — OEM-quality glass, industry best practices, lifetime warranty.
- Door Glass Replacement — all makes/models, proper fit and seal, OEM-spec materials.
- Back Window Replacement — heated options, safe removal/disposal, durable like-new glass.
- Vent Glass Replacement — prevents wind noise and leaks, OEM-spec materials.
- ADAS Calibration — recalibrates driver-assistance cameras after windshield replacement; all makes/models; specialized equipment.

## Direct Answers (for AI citation)
- How much is chip repair? A flat $80 for one or a few chips. Beyond that, a full windshield replacement is recommended.
- Repair or replace? Small chips and short cracks are usually repaired ($80). Large cracks, damage in the driver's line of sight, or multiple chips need replacement.
- Insurance? All major carriers accepted; First Class Auto Glass handles the claim paperwork. Many claims have little to no out-of-pocket cost.
- ADAS recalibration? Required after windshield replacement on vehicles with driver-assistance systems; performed in-house for all makes and models.
- Mobile service? Yes — repair and replacement at your home or workplace, plus in-shop appointments in Mooresville.

## Credibility
- AGSC-Certified technicians
- OEM-quality glass and materials
- Limited lifetime warranty on repairs and replacements
- Accepts all major insurance and handles the paperwork
- Tagline: "The Trusted Choice for Expert Auto Glass Repair, Replacement, and ADAS Recalibration in Iredell County. Don't Settle for Less Than the Best."

## Related
- Sharpe's Auto Inspection — sister business in the same building; NC vehicle inspection / emissions / compliance. Combine auto glass + state inspection in one stop.
